CustomField.description: Date until which this rate record remains effective (inclusive). The engine filters: Effective_End_Date__c ≥ Trip__c.Trip_Date__c OR field is blank (meaning no expiry). Blank = unlimited validity.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: End date of this rate's validity period (inclusive). Leave blank for no expiration. Example: 2025-12-31.
CustomField.label: Effective End Date
